summary: A customized home-use pathway for people managing arm or leg lymphedema, including swelling after breast surgery. Guidance covers assessment, machine and garment selection, supported home use, and review as needs change.
engagement: Assessment of the condition, current care plan, and home-use needs
Device and garment selection matched to the individual case
Guided home-use sessions under expert guidance
Review and adjustment based on progress and practical fit

summary: A guided pathway for people who have been advised to include sequential compression in a DVT-prevention plan. The service focuses on assessment, suitable equipment selection, supported home use, and review alongside the existing care plan.
engagement: Assessment of the condition, current care plan, and home-use needs
Device and garment selection matched to the individual case
Guided home-use sessions under expert guidance
Review and adjustment based on progress and practical fit

summary: A customized support pathway for people managing varicose veins as part of a clinician-directed care plan. Naviga Life helps assess practical needs, select an appropriate machine and garment, guide home use, and review the plan.
engagement: Assessment of the condition, current care plan, and home-use needs
Device and garment selection matched to the individual case
Guided home-use sessions under expert guidance
Review and adjustment based on progress and practical fit

summary: A guided service for people whose venous-ulcer care plan includes compression support. The protocol is customized around the individual case, suitable equipment, home-use guidance, and review with the wider care plan kept in view.

summary: A guided pathway for older adults whose goals include balance, mobility, circulation, and everyday wellbeing. The service begins with assessment and remains customized; device and garment options are introduced only when relevant to the individual case.
engagement: Assessment of wellbeing goals, current care, and home-use needs
Device and garment selection only where relevant to the individual case

summary: A customized pathway for people working through sports injury rehabilitation or athletic recovery with professional guidance. Naviga Life assesses the goal, identifies whether a device belongs in the plan, supports home use, and reviews the approach case by case.
engagement: Assessment of the recovery goal, current plan, and home-use needs
Device and garment selection only where relevant to the individual case
